title: (YTPMV) Snake Is Puzzled
description:
Puzzled?!....

Original Song: Super Mario Galaxy 2 - Puzzle Plank Galaxy
Original Sources: MGS1, MGS2, MGS3, Twin Snakes

This is an originally unfinished joke video from 2015, so sorry for the old outdated idea/fad. This was something that was always planned to go on my alt account, but a combination of not having much content on this account, plus I did have a lot of fun making the audio, I figured it may as well go here. Hopefully I'll be able to finish one of my "bigger" projects some time this year.

Inspired by: Snake Wants Answers
